## FontScaling Enumeration

## Visual Basic

Public Enum FontScaling

## C#

public enum FontScaling

#### Members

| Member Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Pixel** | A value between 0 and the maximum screen resolution (check Game.Resolution to get the size) |
| **ScreenUnits** | A value between 0 and 1, where 1 equals full screen size |
| **FontSize** | A value between 0 and 20, where 20 equals full screen size |

<a id="gta-matrixmembers"></a>

## Matrix Members

[Matrix overview](GTA.Matrix.md)

#### Public Static (Shared) Properties

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Identity](GTA.Matrix.Identity.md) | Gets a [Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md) that represents an identity matrix. |

#### Public Static (Shared) Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Add](GTA.Matrix.Add.md) | Determines the sum of two matrices. |
| [AffineTransformation](GTA.Matrix.AffineTransformation.md) | Creates a 3D affine transformation matrix. |
| [AffineTransformation2D](GTA.Matrix.AffineTransformation2D.md) | Creates a 2D affine transformation matrix. |
| [Billboard](GTA.Matrix.Billboard.md) | Creates a spherical billboard that rotates around a specified object position. |
| [Divide](GTA.Matrix.Divide_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Scales a matrix by the given value. |
| [Equals](GTA.Matrix.Equals_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Determines whether the specified object instances are considered equal. |
| [Invert](GTA.Matrix.Invert_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Calculates the inverse of the specified matrix. |
| [Lerp](GTA.Matrix.Lerp.md) | Performs a linear interpolation between two matricies. |
| [LookAtLH](GTA.Matrix.LookAtLH.md) | Creates a left-handed, look-at matrix. |
| [LookAtRH](GTA.Matrix.LookAtRH.md) | Creates a right-handed, look-at matrix. |
| [Multiply](GTA.Matrix.Multiply_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Scales a matrix by the given value. |
| [Negate](GTA.Matrix.Negate.md) | Negates a matrix. |
| [OrthoLH](GTA.Matrix.OrthoLH.md) | Creates a left-handed, orthographic projection matrix. |
| [OrthoRH](GTA.Matrix.OrthoRH.md) | Creates a right-handed, orthographic projection matrix. |
| [PerspectiveLH](GTA.Matrix.PerspectiveLH.md) | Creates a left-handed, perspective projection matrix. |
| [PerspectiveRH](GTA.Matrix.PerspectiveRH.md) | Creates a right-handed, perspective projection matrix. |
| [RotationAxis](GTA.Matrix.RotationAxis.md) | Creates a matrix that rotates around an arbitary axis. |
| [RotationQuaternion](GTA.Matrix.RotationQuaternion.md) | Creates a rotation matrix from a quaternion. |
| [RotationX](GTA.Matrix.RotationX.md) | Creates a matrix that rotates around the x-axis. |
| [RotationY](GTA.Matrix.RotationY.md) | Creates a matrix that rotates around the y-axis. |
| [RotationYawPitchRoll](GTA.Matrix.RotationYawPitchRoll.md) | Creates a rotation matrix with a specified yaw, pitch, and roll. |
| [RotationZ](GTA.Matrix.RotationZ.md) | Creates a matrix that rotates around the z-axis. |
| [Scaling](GTA.Matrix.Scaling_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Creates a matrix that scales along the x-axis, y-axis, and y-axis. |
| [Subtract](GTA.Matrix.Subtract.md) | Determines the difference between two matrices. |
| [Transformation](GTA.Matrix.Transformation.md) | Creates a transformation matrix. |
| [Transformation2D](GTA.Matrix.Transformation2D.md) | Creates a 2D transformation matrix. |
| [Translation](GTA.Matrix.Translation_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Creates a translation matrix using the specified offsets. |
| [Transpose](GTA.Matrix.Transpose.md) | Calculates the transpose of the specified matrix. |

#### Public Static (Shared) Operators

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Addition Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Addition.md) | Adds two matricies. |
| [Division Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Division_overload_2.md) | Overloaded. Divides two matricies. |
| [Equality Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Equality.md) | Tests for equality between two objects. |
| [Inequality Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Inequality.md) | Tests for inequality between two objects. |
| [Multiplication Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Multiply_overload_3.md) | Overloaded. Multiplies two matricies. |
| [Subtraction Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Subtraction.md) | Subtracts two matricies. |
| [Unary Negation Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_UnaryNegation.md) | Negates a matrix. |

#### Public Instance Fields

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [M11](GTA.Matrix.M11.md) | Gets or sets the element of the matrix that exists in the first row and first column. |
| [M12](GTA.Matrix.M12.md) | Gets or sets the element of the matrix that exists in the first row and second column. |
| [M13](GTA.Matrix.M13.md) | Gets or sets the element of the matrix that exists in the first row and third column. |
| [M14](GTA.Matrix.M14.md) | Gets or sets the element of the matrix that exists in the first row and fourth column. |
| [M21](GTA.Matrix.M21.md) | Gets or sets the element of the matrix that exists in the second row and first column. |

<a id="gta-matrixmethods"></a>

## Methods

The methods of the **Matrix** structure are listed below. For a complete list of **Matrix** structure members, see the [Matrix Members](GTA.MatrixMembers.md) topic.

#### Public Static (Shared) Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Add](GTA.Matrix.Add.md) | Determines the sum of two matrices. |
| [AffineTransformation](GTA.Matrix.AffineTransformation.md) | Creates a 3D affine transformation matrix. |
| [AffineTransformation2D](GTA.Matrix.AffineTransformation2D.md) | Creates a 2D affine transformation matrix. |
| [Billboard](GTA.Matrix.Billboard.md) | Creates a spherical billboard that rotates around a specified object position. |
| [Divide](GTA.Matrix.Divide_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Scales a matrix by the given value. |
| [Equals](GTA.Matrix.Equals_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Determines whether the specified object instances are considered equal. |
| [Invert](GTA.Matrix.Invert_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Calculates the inverse of the specified matrix. |
| [Lerp](GTA.Matrix.Lerp.md) | Performs a linear interpolation between two matricies. |
| [LookAtLH](GTA.Matrix.LookAtLH.md) | Creates a left-handed, look-at matrix. |
| [LookAtRH](GTA.Matrix.LookAtRH.md) | Creates a right-handed, look-at matrix. |
| [Multiply](GTA.Matrix.Multiply_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Scales a matrix by the given value. |
| [Negate](GTA.Matrix.Negate.md) | Negates a matrix. |
| [OrthoLH](GTA.Matrix.OrthoLH.md) | Creates a left-handed, orthographic projection matrix. |
| [OrthoRH](GTA.Matrix.OrthoRH.md) | Creates a right-handed, orthographic projection matrix. |
| [PerspectiveLH](GTA.Matrix.PerspectiveLH.md) | Creates a left-handed, perspective projection matrix. |
| [PerspectiveRH](GTA.Matrix.PerspectiveRH.md) | Creates a right-handed, perspective projection matrix. |
| [RotationAxis](GTA.Matrix.RotationAxis.md) | Creates a matrix that rotates around an arbitary axis. |
| [RotationQuaternion](GTA.Matrix.RotationQuaternion.md) | Creates a rotation matrix from a quaternion. |
| [RotationX](GTA.Matrix.RotationX.md) | Creates a matrix that rotates around the x-axis. |
| [RotationY](GTA.Matrix.RotationY.md) | Creates a matrix that rotates around the y-axis. |
| [RotationYawPitchRoll](GTA.Matrix.RotationYawPitchRoll.md) | Creates a rotation matrix with a specified yaw, pitch, and roll. |
| [RotationZ](GTA.Matrix.RotationZ.md) | Creates a matrix that rotates around the z-axis. |
| [Scaling](GTA.Matrix.Scaling_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Creates a matrix that scales along the x-axis, y-axis, and y-axis. |
| [Subtract](GTA.Matrix.Subtract.md) | Determines the difference between two matrices. |
| [Transformation](GTA.Matrix.Transformation.md) | Creates a transformation matrix. |
| [Transformation2D](GTA.Matrix.Transformation2D.md) | Creates a 2D transformation matrix. |
| [Translation](GTA.Matrix.Translation_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Creates a translation matrix using the specified offsets. |
| [Transpose](GTA.Matrix.Transpose.md) | Calculates the transpose of the specified matrix. |

#### Public Instance Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Determinant](GTA.Matrix.Determinant.md) | Calculates the determinant of the matrix. |
| [Equals](GTA.Matrix.Equals_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Returns a value that indicates whether the current instance is equal to the specified object. |
| [GetHashCode](GTA.Matrix.GetHashCode.md) | Returns the hash code for this instance. |
| [Invert](GTA.Matrix.Invert_overload_2.md) | Overloaded. Inverts the matrix. |
| [ToArray](GTA.Matrix.ToArray.md) |  |
| [ToString](GTA.Matrix.ToString.md) | Converts the value of the object to its equivalent string representation. |

## AffineTransformation Method

Creates a 3D affine transformation matrix.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Function AffineTransformation( \_
   ByVal *scaling* As [Single](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp), \_
   ByVal *rotationCenter* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md), \_
   ByVal *rotation* As [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md), \_
   ByVal *translation* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) \_
) As [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md) AffineTransformation(
   [float](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) *scaling*,
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *rotationCenter*,
   [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) *rotation*,
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *translation*
);

#### Parameters

*scaling*
:   Scaling factor.

*rotationCenter*
:   The center of the rotation.

*rotation*
:   The rotation of the transformation.

*translation*
:   The translation factor of the transformation.

#### Return Value

The created affine transformation matrix.

Public Shared Function Billboard( \_

   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *cameraForwardVector*
);

<a id="gta-matrix-lerp"></a>

## Lerp Method

Performs a linear interpolation between two matricies.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Function Lerp( \_
   ByVal *start* As [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md), \_
   ByVal *end* As [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md), \_
   ByVal *amount* As [Single](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) \_
) As [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md) Lerp(
   [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md) *start*,
   [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md) *end*,
   [float](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) *amount*
);

#### Parameters

*start*
:   Start matrix.

*end*
:   End matrix.

*amount*
:   Value between 0 and 1 indicating the weight of *end*.

#### Return Value

The linear interpolation of the two matrices.

#### Remarks

This method performs the linear interpolation based on the following formula.

```
start + (end - start) * amount
```

Passing *amount* a value of 0 will cause *start* to be returned; a value of 1 will cause *end* to be returned.

#### See Also

[Matrix Class](GTA.Matrix.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

---

## Transformation Method

Creates a transformation matrix.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Function Transformation( \_
   ByVal *scalingCenter* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md), \_
   ByVal *scalingRotation* As [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md), \_
   ByVal *scaling* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md), \_
   ByVal *rotationCenter* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md), \_
   ByVal *rotation* As [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md), \_
   ByVal *translation* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) \_
) As [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md) Transformation(
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *scalingCenter*,
   [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) *scalingRotation*,
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *scaling*,
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *rotationCenter*,
   [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) *rotation*,
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *translation*
);

#### Parameters

*scalingCenter*
:   Center point of the scaling operation.

*scalingRotation*
:   Scaling rotation amount.

*scaling*
:   Scaling factor.

*rotationCenter*
:   The center of the rotation.

*rotation*
:   The rotation of the transformation.

*translation*
:   The translation factor of the transformation.

#### Return Value

The created transformation matrix.

#### See Also

[Matrix Class](GTA.Matrix.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

| [Equality Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Equality.md) | Tests for equality between two objects. |
| [Inequality Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Inequality.md) | Tests for inequality between two objects. |
| [Multiplication Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Multiply_overload_3.md) | Overloaded. Multiplies two matricies. |
| [Subtraction Operator](GTA.Matrix.op_Subtraction.md) | Subtracts two matricies. |

## Visual Basic

Public Class MemoryStream

Inherits [System.IO.Stream](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemIOStreamClassTopic.asp)

## C#

public class MemoryStream **: [Stream](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemIOStreamClassTopic.asp)**

#### Thread Safety

Public static (**Shared** in Visual Basic) members of this type are
safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

**Namespace:**
[GTA](GTA.md)

public struct Model

#### Thread Safety

Public static (**Shared** in Visual Basic) members of this type are
safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

<a id="gta-model-getdimensions-overloads"></a>

## GetDimensions Method

Returns the total dimensions of the model. X is width, Y is length, Z is height.

#### Overload List

Returns the total dimensions of the model. X is width, Y is length, Z is height.

> [public GTA.Vector3 GetDimensions();](GTA.Model.GetDimensions_overload_1.md)

Returns the dimensions of the model as a 3D box defined by two vectors. Directions: positive X is right, positive Y is front, positive Z is Top

> [public void GetDimensions(ref GTA.Vector3,ref GTA.Vector3);](GTA.Model.GetDimensions_overload_2.md)

<a id="gta-ped-health"></a>

## Health Property

Gets or sets the current health of the ped. 1 to 100 is the normal range. Can be greater than 100 for Peds with incresed MaxHealth. -99 to 0 is injured. -100 is completely dead.

## Visual Basic

Public Property Health As [Integer](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemInt32ClassTopic.asp)

## C#

public [int](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemInt32ClassTopic.asp) Health {get; set;}

#### See Also

<a id="gta-pedmethods"></a>

## Methods

The methods of the **Ped** class are listed below. For a complete list of **Ped** class members, see the [Ped Members](GTA.PedMembers.md) topic.

#### Public Instance Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [ApplyForce](GTA.Ped.ApplyForce_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Applies a force given in world coordinates to the ped. |
| [ApplyForceRelative](GTA.Ped.ApplyForceRelative_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Applies a force that is relative to the current orientation of the ped. Directions: positive X is right, positive Y is front, positive Z is Top |
| [AttachBlip](GTA.Ped.AttachBlip.md) |  |
| [AttachTo](GTA.Ped.AttachTo.md) | Attaches the ped to a vehicle WITHOUT physics! |
| [BecomeMissionCharacter](GTA.Ped.BecomeMissionCharacter.md) |  |
| [CancelAmbientSpeech](GTA.Ped.CancelAmbientSpeech.md) |  |
| [CantBeDamagedByRelationshipGroup](GTA.Ped.CantBeDamagedByRelationshipGroup.md) |  |
| [ChangeRelationship](GTA.Ped.ChangeRelationship.md) |  |
| [Delete](GTA.Ped.Delete.md) |  |
| [Detach](GTA.Ped.Detach.md) |  |
| [Die](GTA.Ped.Die.md) |  |
| [DropCurrentWeapon](GTA.Ped.DropCurrentWeapon.md) |  |
| [Equals](GTA.base.HandleObject.Equals_overloads.md) (inherited from **HandleObject**) | Overloaded. |
| [Exists](GTA.base.Object.Exists.md) (inherited from **object**) | Returns whether the object still exists in game. Other calls to non-existing objects will result in an error. This function is FAST and is better checked too much rather than too less. |
| [FleeByVehicle](GTA.Ped.FleeByVehicle.md) |  |
| [ForceHelmet](GTA.Ped.ForceHelmet.md) |  |
| [ForceRagdoll](GTA.Ped.ForceRagdoll.md) |  |
| [GetBonePosition](GTA.Ped.GetBonePosition.md) |  |
| [GetControllingPlayer](GTA.Ped.GetControllingPlayer.md) |  |
| [GetHashCode](GTA.base.HandleObject.GetHashCode.md) (inherited from **HandleObject**) |  |
| [GetOffsetPosition](GTA.Ped.GetOffsetPosition.md) | Returns the given offset in world coordinates. Directions: positive X is right, positive Y is front, positive Z is Top |
| [GiveFakeNetworkName](GTA.Ped.GiveFakeNetworkName.md) |  |
| [HasBeenDamagedBy](GTA.Ped.HasBeenDamagedBy_overloads.md) | Overloaded. |
| [isAttachedToVehicle](GTA.Ped.isAttachedToVehicle.md) |  |

## Quaternion Structure

[System.Object](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemObjectClassTopic.asp)

   [System.ValueType](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemValueTypeClassTopic.asp)
      **GTA.Quaternion**

## Visual Basic

Public Structure Quaternion

## C#

public struct Quaternion

#### Thread Safety

Public static (**Shared** in Visual Basic) members of this type are
safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

#### Requirements

**Namespace:**
[GTA](GTA.md)

**Assembly:** ScriptHookDotNet (in ScriptHookDotNet.dll)

#### See Also

[Quaternion Members](GTA.QuaternionMembers.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

<a id="gta-quaternionmembers"></a>

## Quaternion Members

[Quaternion overview](GTA.Quaternion.md)

#### Public Static (Shared) Properties

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Identity](GTA.Quaternion.Identity.md) | Gets the identity [Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) (0, 0, 0, 1). |

#### Public Static (Shared) Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Add](GTA.Quaternion.Add.md) | Adds two quaternions. |
| [Divide](GTA.Quaternion.Divide.md) | Divides a quaternion by another. |
| [Dot](GTA.Quaternion.Dot.md) | Calculates the dot product of two quaternions. |
| [Equals](GTA.Quaternion.Equals_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Determines whether the specified object instances are considered equal. |
| [FromRotation](GTA.Quaternion.FromRotation.md) |  |
| [Invert](GTA.Quaternion.Invert_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Conjugates and renormalizes the quaternion. |
| [Lerp](GTA.Quaternion.Lerp.md) | Performs a linear interpolation between two quaternion. |
| [Multiply](GTA.Quaternion.Multiply_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Scales a quaternion by the given value. |
| [Negate](GTA.Quaternion.Negate.md) | Reverses the direction of a given quaternion. |
| [Normalize](GTA.Quaternion.Normalize_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Converts the quaternion into a unit quaternion. |
| [RotationAxis](GTA.Quaternion.RotationAxis.md) | Creates a quaternion given a rotation and an axis. |
| [RotationMatrix](GTA.Quaternion.RotationMatrix.md) | Creates a quaternion given a rotation matrix. |
| [RotationYawPitchRoll](GTA.Quaternion.RotationYawPitchRoll.md) | Creates a quaternion given a yaw, pitch, and roll value. |
| [Subtract](GTA.Quaternion.Subtract.md) | Subtracts two quaternions. |

#### Public Static (Shared) Operators

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Addition Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Addition.md) | Adds two quaternions. |
| [Division Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Division.md) | Divides a quaternion by another. |
| [Equality Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Equality.md) | Tests for equality between two objects. |
| [Inequality Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Inequality.md) | Tests for inequality between two objects. |
| [Multiplication Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Multiply_overload_3.md) | Overloaded. Multiplies a quaternion by another. |
| [Subtraction Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Subtraction.md) | Subtracts two quaternions. |
| [Unary Negation Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_UnaryNegation.md) | Reverses the direction of a given quaternion. |

<a id="gta-quaternion-lerp"></a>

## Lerp Method

Performs a linear interpolation between two quaternion.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Function Lerp( \_
   ByVal *start* As [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md), \_
   ByVal *end* As [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md), \_
   ByVal *amount* As [Single](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) \_
) As [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) Lerp(
   [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) *start*,
   [GTA.Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) *end*,
   [float](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) *amount*
);

#### Parameters

*start*
:   Start quaternion.

*end*
:   End quaternion.

*amount*
:   Value between 0 and 1 indicating the weight of *end*.

#### Return Value

The linear interpolation of the two quaternions.

#### Remarks

This method performs the linear interpolation based on the following formula.

```
start + (end - start) * amount
```

Passing *amount* a value of 0 will cause *start* to be returned; a value of 1 will cause *end* to be returned.

#### See Also

[Quaternion Class](GTA.Quaternion.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

---

## Operators

The operators of the **Quaternion** structure are listed below. For a complete list of **Quaternion** structure members, see the [Quaternion Members](GTA.QuaternionMembers.md) topic.

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Addition Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Addition.md) | Adds two quaternions. |
| [Division Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Division.md) | Divides a quaternion by another. |
| [Equality Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Equality.md) | Tests for equality between two objects. |
| [Inequality Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Inequality.md) | Tests for inequality between two objects. |
| [Multiplication Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Multiply_overload_3.md) | Overloaded. Multiplies a quaternion by another. |
| [Subtraction Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_Subtraction.md) | Subtracts two quaternions. |
| [Unary Negation Operator](GTA.Quaternion.op_UnaryNegation.md) | Reverses the direction of a given quaternion. |

The events of the **Script** class are listed below. For a complete list of **Script** class members, see the [Script Members](GTA.ScriptMembers.md) topic.

|  |  |
| --- | --- |

| [KeyUp](GTA.Script.KeyUp.md) |  |
| [MouseDown](GTA.Script.MouseDown.md) |  |
| [MouseUp](GTA.Script.MouseUp.md) |  |
| [PerFrameDrawing](GTA.Script.PerFrameDrawing.md) | Will run every Frame. Use ONLY for drawing functions! Do NOT call Wait() here! |
| [PhoneNumberDialed](GTA.Script.PhoneNumberDialed.md) |  |
| [ScriptCommand](GTA.Script.ScriptCommand.md) |  |
| [Tick](GTA.Script.Tick.md) |  |

## C#

public event [GTA.KeyEventHandler](GTA.KeyEventHandler.md) KeyDown;

#### Event Data

The event handler receives an argument of type [KeyEventArgs](GTA.KeyEventArgs.md) containing data related to this event. The following **KeyEventArgs** properties provide information specific to this event.

| Property | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Alt](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Alt.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Alt. |
| [Control](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Control.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Control. |
| [isModifier](GTA.KeyEventArgs.isModifier.md) |  |
| [isMouseButton](GTA.KeyEventArgs.isMouseButton.md) |  |
| [Key](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Key.md) | Returns the key without any modifier information. |
| [KeyWithModifiers](GTA.KeyEventArgs.KeyWithModifiers.md) | Returns the key combined with modifier (Shift, Control, Alt) information. |
| [MouseButton](GTA.KeyEventArgs.MouseButton.md) |  |
| [Shift](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Shift.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Shift. |

#### See Also

[Script Class](GTA.Script.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

| [Open](GTA.SettingsFile.Open.md) |  |

#### Public Instance Properties

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Filename](GTA.SettingsFile.Filename.md) | The setting file has the same filename as the script, just with an 'ini' extension. |

#### Public Instance Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Clear](GTA.SettingsFile.Clear.md) |  |
| [Dispose](GTA.SettingsFile.Dispose_overload_2.md) | Overloaded. |
| [GetCategoryNames](GTA.SettingsFile.GetCategoryNames.md) | Get the names of all categories. |
| [GetValueBool](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueBool_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a boolean value with the given name from the settings file. INI values that return true: true, yes, on, 1. INI values that return false: false, no, off, 0. |
| [GetValueFloat](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueFloat_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a float value with the given name from the settings file. |
| [GetValueInteger](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueInteger_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get an integer value with the given name from the settings file. |
| [GetValueKey](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueKey_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a value with the given name from the settings file and convert is to a key. The key may be given as the key's name or as keycode. |
| [GetValueModel](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueModel_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a value with the given name from the settings file and convert is to a model. The model may be given as modelname, integer or hex value. |
| [GetValueNames](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueNames_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get the names of all values in the default category. |
| [GetValueString](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueString_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a string value with the given name from the settings file. |
| [GetValueVector3](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueVector3_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get the value with the given name from the settings file and convert it to a Vector3. The 3 float values can be seperated by space or by a comma ',' . |
| [Load](GTA.SettingsFile.Load.md) | Load the settings file again. In is automatically loaded on script startup. |
| [Save](GTA.SettingsFile.Save.md) |  |
| [SaveCopyTo](GTA.SettingsFile.SaveCopyTo.md) |  |
| [SetValue](GTA.SettingsFile.SetValue_overloads.md) | Overloaded. |

<a id="gta-settingsfilemethods"></a>

## Methods

The methods of the **SettingsFile** class are listed below. For a complete list of **SettingsFile** class members, see the [SettingsFile Members](GTA.SettingsFileMembers.md) topic.

#### Public Static (Shared) Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Open](GTA.SettingsFile.Open.md) |  |

#### Public Instance Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Clear](GTA.SettingsFile.Clear.md) |  |
| [Dispose](GTA.SettingsFile.Dispose_overload_2.md) | Overloaded. |
| [GetCategoryNames](GTA.SettingsFile.GetCategoryNames.md) | Get the names of all categories. |
| [GetValueBool](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueBool_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a boolean value with the given name from the settings file. INI values that return true: true, yes, on, 1. INI values that return false: false, no, off, 0. |
| [GetValueFloat](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueFloat_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a float value with the given name from the settings file. |
| [GetValueInteger](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueInteger_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get an integer value with the given name from the settings file. |
| [GetValueKey](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueKey_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a value with the given name from the settings file and convert is to a key. The key may be given as the key's name or as keycode. |
| [GetValueModel](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueModel_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a value with the given name from the settings file and convert is to a model. The model may be given as modelname, integer or hex value. |
| [GetValueNames](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueNames_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get the names of all values in the default category. |
| [GetValueString](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueString_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get a string value with the given name from the settings file. |
| [GetValueVector3](GTA.SettingsFile.GetValueVector3_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Get the value with the given name from the settings file and convert it to a Vector3. The 3 float values can be seperated by space or by a comma ',' . |
| [Load](GTA.SettingsFile.Load.md) | Load the settings file again. In is automatically loaded on script startup. |
| [Save](GTA.SettingsFile.Save.md) |  |
| [SaveCopyTo](GTA.SettingsFile.SaveCopyTo.md) |  |
| [SetValue](GTA.SettingsFile.SetValue_overloads.md) | Overloaded. |

|  |  |
| --- | --- |

## TextAlignment Enumeration

## Visual Basic

Public Enum TextAlignment

## C#

public enum TextAlignment

#### Members

| Member Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Bottom** | Align the text to the bottom. |
| **Right** | Align the text to the right. |
| **Left** | Align the text to the left. |
| **Top** | Align the text to the top. |
| **NoClip** | Don't clip the text. |
| **ExpandTabs** | Expand tab characters. |
| **SingleLine** | Force all text to a single line. |
| **WordBreak** | Allow word breaks. |
| **VerticalCenter** | Vertically align the text to the center. |
| **Center** | Align the text to the center. |

#### Public Instance Properties

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [ElapsedTime](GTA.Timer.ElapsedTime.md) | Time elapsed since the last Start. Does not increase when the Timer is stopped. |
| [Interval](GTA.Timer.Interval.md) | The interval (in Milliseconds) at which the Tick event will be fired. The Tick event will not run if Interval is negative. Any Wait() in your Script will delay the next Tick until after the Wait is finished. |
| [isRunning](GTA.Timer.isRunning.md) |  |

#### Public Instance Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Start](GTA.Timer.Start.md) | Starts the Timer and resets the ElapsedTime back to 0. The Tick event will fire each Interval if Interval is greater than or equal to 0. |
| [Stop](GTA.Timer.Stop.md) | Stops the Timer from firing Tick events and freezes the current value of ElapsedTime. |

The interval (in Milliseconds) at which the Tick event will be fired. The Tick event will not run if Interval is negative. Any Wait() in your Script will delay the next Tick until after the Wait is finished.

#### Public Static (Shared) Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Add](GTA.Vector2.Add.md) | Adds two vectors. |
| [Clamp](GTA.Vector2.Clamp.md) | Restricts a value to be within a specified range. |
| [Distance](GTA.Vector2.Distance.md) | Calculates the distance between two vectors. |
| [Divide](GTA.Vector2.Divide.md) | Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Dot](GTA.Vector2.Dot.md) | Calculates the dot product of two vectors. |
| [Equals](GTA.Vector2.Equals_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Determines whether the specified object instances are considered equal. |
| [Lerp](GTA.Vector2.Lerp.md) | Performs a linear interpolation between two vectors. |
| [Maximize](GTA.Vector2.Maximize.md) | Returns a vector containing the largest components of the specified vectors. |
| [Minimize](GTA.Vector2.Minimize.md) | Returns a vector containing the smallest components of the specified vectors. |
| [Modulate](GTA.Vector2.Modulate.md) | Modulates a vector by another. |
| [Multiply](GTA.Vector2.Multiply.md) | Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Negate](GTA.Vector2.Negate.md) | Reverses the direction of a given vector. |
| [Normalize](GTA.Vector2.Normalize_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Converts the vector into a unit vector. |
| [Subtract](GTA.Vector2.Subtract.md) | Subtracts two vectors. |
| [Transform](GTA.Vector2.Transform_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Transforms a 2D vector by the given [Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) rotation. |
| [TransformCoordinate](GTA.Vector2.TransformCoordinate.md) | Performs a coordinate transformation using the given [Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md). |
| [TransformNormal](GTA.Vector2.TransformNormal.md) | Performs a normal transformation using the given [Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md). |

|  |  |
| --- | --- |

| [Division Operator](GTA.Vector2.op_Division.md) | Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Equality Operator](GTA.Vector2.op_Equality.md) | Tests for equality between two objects. |
| [Inequality Operator](GTA.Vector2.op_Inequality.md) | Tests for inequality between two objects. |
| [Multiplication Operator](GTA.Vector2.op_Multiply_overload_2.md) | Overloaded. Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Subtraction Operator](GTA.Vector2.op_Subtraction.md) | Subtracts two vectors. |
| [Unary Negation Operator](GTA.Vector2.op_UnaryNegation.md) | Reverses the direction of a given vector. |

<a id="gta-vector2-lerp"></a>

## Lerp Method

Performs a linear interpolation between two vectors.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Function Lerp( \_
   ByVal *start* As [GTA.Vector2](GTA.Vector2.md), \_
   ByVal *end* As [GTA.Vector2](GTA.Vector2.md), \_
   ByVal *amount* As [Single](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) \_
) As [GTA.Vector2](GTA.Vector2.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Vector2](GTA.Vector2.md) Lerp(
   [GTA.Vector2](GTA.Vector2.md) *start*,
   [GTA.Vector2](GTA.Vector2.md) *end*,
   [float](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) *amount*
);

#### Parameters

*start*
:   Start vector.

*end*
:   End vector.

*amount*
:   Value between 0 and 1 indicating the weight of *end*.

#### Return Value

The linear interpolation of the two vectors.

#### Remarks

This method performs the linear interpolation based on the following formula.

```
start + (end - start) * amount
```

Passing *amount* a value of 0 will cause *start* to be returned; a value of 1 will cause *end* to be returned.

#### See Also

[Vector2 Class](GTA.Vector2.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

---

safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

| [RelativeTop](GTA.Vector3.RelativeTop.md) | Returns the relative Top vector. (0,0,1) |
| [WorldDown](GTA.Vector3.WorldDown.md) | Returns the world Down vector. (0,0,-1) |
| [WorldEast](GTA.Vector3.WorldEast.md) | Returns the world East vector. (1,0,0) |
| [WorldNorth](GTA.Vector3.WorldNorth.md) | Returns the world North vector. (0,1,0) |
| [WorldSouth](GTA.Vector3.WorldSouth.md) | Returns the world South vector. (0,-1,0) |
| [WorldUp](GTA.Vector3.WorldUp.md) | Returns the world Up vector. (0,0,1) |
| [WorldWest](GTA.Vector3.WorldWest.md) | Returns the world West vector. (-1,0,0) |

| [Unproject](GTA.Vector3.Unproject.md) | Projects a 3D vector from screen space into object space. |

| [RelativeFront](GTA.Vector3.RelativeFront.md) | Returns the relative Front vector. (0,1,0) |
| [RelativeLeft](GTA.Vector3.RelativeLeft.md) | Returns the relative Left vector. (-1,0,0) |
| [RelativeRight](GTA.Vector3.RelativeRight.md) | Returns the relative Right vector. (1,0,0) |
| [RelativeTop](GTA.Vector3.RelativeTop.md) | Returns the relative Top vector. (0,0,1) |
| [WorldDown](GTA.Vector3.WorldDown.md) | Returns the world Down vector. (0,0,-1) |
| [WorldEast](GTA.Vector3.WorldEast.md) | Returns the world East vector. (1,0,0) |
| [WorldNorth](GTA.Vector3.WorldNorth.md) | Returns the world North vector. (0,1,0) |
| [WorldSouth](GTA.Vector3.WorldSouth.md) | Returns the world South vector. (0,-1,0) |

| [WorldWest](GTA.Vector3.WorldWest.md) | Returns the world West vector. (-1,0,0) |

## Methods

The methods of the **Vector3** structure are listed below. For a complete list of **Vector3** structure members, see the [Vector3 Members](GTA.Vector3Members.md) topic.

#### Public Static (Shared) Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Add](GTA.Vector3.Add.md) | Adds two vectors. |
| [Clamp](GTA.Vector3.Clamp.md) | Restricts a value to be within a specified range. |
| [Cross](GTA.Vector3.Cross.md) | Calculates the cross product of two vectors. |
| [Divide](GTA.Vector3.Divide.md) | Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Dot](GTA.Vector3.Dot.md) | Calculates the dot product of two vectors. |
| [Equals](GTA.Vector3.Equals_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Determines whether the specified object instances are considered equal. |
| [Lerp](GTA.Vector3.Lerp.md) | Performs a linear interpolation between two vectors. |
| [Maximize](GTA.Vector3.Maximize.md) | Returns a vector containing the largest components of the specified vectors. |
| [Minimize](GTA.Vector3.Minimize.md) | Returns a vector containing the smallest components of the specified vectors. |
| [Modulate](GTA.Vector3.Modulate.md) | Modulates a vector by another. |
| [Multiply](GTA.Vector3.Multiply.md) | Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Negate](GTA.Vector3.Negate.md) | Reverses the direction of a given vector. |
| [Normalize](GTA.Vector3.Normalize_overload_1.md) | Overloaded. Converts the vector into a unit vector. |
| [Project](GTA.Vector3.Project.md) | Projects a 3D vector from object space into screen space. |
| [RandomXY](GTA.Vector3.RandomXY.md) |  |
| [RandomXYZ](GTA.Vector3.RandomXYZ.md) |  |
| [Reflect](GTA.Vector3.Reflect.md) | Returns the reflection of a vector off a surface that has the specified normal. |
| [Subtract](GTA.Vector3.Subtract.md) | Subtracts two vectors. |
| [Transform](GTA.Vector3.Transform_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Transforms a 3D vector by the given [Quaternion](GTA.Quaternion.md) rotation. |
| [TransformCoordinate](GTA.Vector3.TransformCoordinate.md) | Performs a coordinate transformation using the given [Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md). |
| [TransformNormal](GTA.Vector3.TransformNormal.md) | Performs a normal transformation using the given [Matrix](GTA.Matrix.md). |
| [Unproject](GTA.Vector3.Unproject.md) | Projects a 3D vector from screen space into object space. |

| --- | --- |

| [GetHashCode](GTA.Vector3.GetHashCode.md) | Returns the hash code for this instance. |
| [Length](GTA.Vector3.Length.md) | Calculates the length of the vector. |

<a id="gta-vector3-lerp"></a>

## Lerp Method

Performs a linear interpolation between two vectors.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Function Lerp( \_
   ByVal *start* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md), \_
   ByVal *end* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md), \_
   ByVal *amount* As [Single](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) \_
) As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) Lerp(
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *start*,
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *end*,
   [float](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) *amount*
);

#### Parameters

*start*
:   Start vector.

*end*
:   End vector.

*amount*
:   Value between 0 and 1 indicating the weight of *end*.

#### Return Value

The linear interpolation of the two vectors.

#### Remarks

This method performs the linear interpolation based on the following formula.

```
start + (end - start) * amount
```

Passing *amount* a value of 0 will cause *start* to be returned; a value of 1 will cause *end* to be returned.

#### See Also

[Vector3 Class](GTA.Vector3.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

---

   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *vector*,

   [int](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemInt32ClassTopic.asp) *y*,

);

#### Parameters

*vector*
:   The vector to project.

*x*
:   The X position of the viewport.

*y*
:   The Y position of the viewport.

*width*
:   The width of the viewport.

*height*
:   The height of the viewport.

*minZ*
:   The minimum depth of the viewport.

*maxZ*
:   The maximum depth of the viewport.

*worldViewProjection*
:   The combined world-view-projection matrix.

#### Return Value

The vector in screen space.

<a id="gta-vector3-reflect"></a>

## Reflect Method

Returns the reflection of a vector off a surface that has the specified normal.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Function Reflect( \_
   ByVal *vector* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md), \_
   ByVal *normal* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) \_
) As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) Reflect(
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *vector*,
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *normal*
);

#### Parameters

*vector*
:   The source vector.

*normal*
:   Normal of the surface.

#### Return Value

The reflected vector.

#### Remarks

Reflect only gives the direction of a reflection off a surface, it does not determine whether the original vector was close enough to the surface to hit it.

#### See Also

[Vector3 Class](GTA.Vector3.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

<a id="gta-vector3operators"></a>

## Operators

The operators of the **Vector3** structure are listed below. For a complete list of **Vector3** structure members, see the [Vector3 Members](GTA.Vector3Members.md) topic.

#### Public Static (Shared) Operators

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Addition Operator](GTA.Vector3.op_Addition.md) | Adds two vectors. |
| [Division Operator](GTA.Vector3.op_Division.md) | Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Equality Operator](GTA.Vector3.op_Equality.md) | Tests for equality between two objects. |
| [Inequality Operator](GTA.Vector3.op_Inequality.md) | Tests for inequality between two objects. |
| [Multiplication Operator](GTA.Vector3.op_Multiply_overload_2.md) | Overloaded. Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Subtraction Operator](GTA.Vector3.op_Subtraction.md) | Subtracts two vectors. |
| [Unary Negation Operator](GTA.Vector3.op_UnaryNegation.md) | Reverses the direction of a given vector. |

#### See Also

[Vector3 Class](GTA.Vector3.md) | [Vector3 Members](GTA.Vector3Members.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

<a id="gta-vector4-lerp"></a>

## Lerp Method

Performs a linear interpolation between two vectors.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Function Lerp( \_
   ByVal *start* As [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md), \_
   ByVal *end* As [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md), \_
   ByVal *amount* As [Single](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) \_
) As [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md) Lerp(
   [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md) *start*,
   [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md) *end*,
   [float](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) *amount*
);

#### Parameters

*start*
:   Start vector.

*end*
:   End vector.

*amount*
:   Value between 0 and 1 indicating the weight of *end*.

#### Return Value

The linear interpolation of the two vectors.

#### Remarks

This method performs the linear interpolation based on the following formula.

```
start + (end - start) * amount
```

Passing *amount* a value of 0 will cause *start* to be returned; a value of 1 will cause *end* to be returned.

#### See Also

[Vector4 Class](GTA.Vector4.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

---

| [Addition Operator](GTA.Vector4.op_Addition.md) | Adds two vectors. |

| [Equality Operator](GTA.Vector4.op_Equality.md) | Tests for equality between two objects. |
| [Inequality Operator](GTA.Vector4.op_Inequality.md) | Tests for inequality between two objects. |
| [Multiplication Operator](GTA.Vector4.op_Multiply_overload_2.md) | Overloaded. Scales a vector by the given value. |
| [Subtraction Operator](GTA.Vector4.op_Subtraction.md) | Subtracts two vectors. |
| [Unary Negation Operator](GTA.Vector4.op_UnaryNegation.md) | Reverses the direction of a given vector. |

<a id="gta-vector4-op-subtraction"></a>

## Subtraction Operator

Subtracts two vectors.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Operator -(left As [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md), right As [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md)) As [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md) operator -(
   [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md) *left*,
   [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md) *right*
);

#### Parameters

*left*
:   The first vector to subtract.

*right*
:   The second vector to subtract.

#### Return Value

The difference of the two vectors.

#### See Also

[Vector4 Class](GTA.Vector4.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

---

<a id="gta-vector4-op-unarynegation"></a>

## Unary Negation Operator

Reverses the direction of a given vector.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Operator -(value As [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md)) As [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md)

## C#

public static [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md) operator -(
   [GTA.Vector4](GTA.Vector4.md) *value*
);

#### Parameters

*value*
:   The vector to negate.

#### Return Value

A vector facing in the opposite direction.

#### See Also

[Vector4 Class](GTA.Vector4.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

<a id="gta-vehicle-rotation"></a>

## Rotation Property

Gets or sets the rotation of the vehicle. X is pitch, Y is roll, Z is yaw. Can be slightly off. Use RotationQuaternion if it should be perfectly accurate.

<a id="gta-vehiclemethods"></a>

## Methods

The methods of the **Vehicle** class are listed below. For a complete list of **Vehicle** class members, see the [Vehicle Members](GTA.VehicleMembers.md) topic.

#### Public Instance Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [ApplyForce](GTA.Vehicle.ApplyForce_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Applies a force given in world coordinates to the vehicle. |
| [ApplyForceRelative](GTA.Vehicle.ApplyForceRelative_overloads.md) | Overloaded. Applies a force that is relative to the current orientation of the vehicle. Directions: positive X is right, positive Y is front, positive Z is Top |
| [AttachBlip](GTA.Vehicle.AttachBlip.md) |  |
| [BurstTire](GTA.Vehicle.BurstTire.md) |  |
| [CloseAllDoors](GTA.Vehicle.CloseAllDoors.md) |  |
| [CreatePedOnSeat](GTA.Vehicle.CreatePedOnSeat_overloads.md) | Overloaded. |
| [Delete](GTA.Vehicle.Delete.md) |  |
| [Door](GTA.Vehicle.Door.md) |  |
| [Equals](GTA.base.HandleObject.Equals_overloads.md) (inherited from **HandleObject**) | Overloaded. |
| [EveryoneLeaveVehicle](GTA.Vehicle.EveryoneLeaveVehicle.md) |  |
| [Exists](GTA.base.Object.Exists.md) (inherited from **object**) | Returns whether the object still exists in game. Other calls to non-existing objects will result in an error. This function is FAST and is better checked too much rather than too less. |
| [Explode](GTA.Vehicle.Explode.md) |  |
| [Extras](GTA.Vehicle.Extras.md) |  |
| [FixTire](GTA.Vehicle.FixTire.md) |  |
| [GetFreePassengerSeat](GTA.Vehicle.GetFreePassengerSeat.md) |  |
| [GetFreeSeat](GTA.Vehicle.GetFreeSeat.md) |  |
| [GetHashCode](GTA.base.HandleObject.GetHashCode.md) (inherited from **HandleObject**) |  |
| [GetOffset](GTA.Vehicle.GetOffset.md) | Returns the given position as directional offset using the following directions: positive X is right, positive Y is in front, positive Z is on Top |
| [GetOffsetPosition](GTA.Vehicle.GetOffsetPosition.md) | Returns the given offset in world coordinates. Directions: positive X is right, positive Y is front, positive Z is Top |
| [GetPedOnSeat](GTA.Vehicle.GetPedOnSeat.md) |  |
| [isSeatFree](GTA.Vehicle.isSeatFree.md) |  |
| [IsTireBurst](GTA.Vehicle.IsTireBurst.md) |  |
| [isTouching](GTA.Vehicle.isTouching.md) |  |

[System.Object](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemObjectClassTopic.asp)

   **GTA.World**

## Visual Basic

NotInheritable Public Class World

## C#

public sealed class World

#### Thread Safety

Public static (**Shared** in Visual Basic) members of this type are
safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

#### Requirements

**Namespace:**
[GTA](GTA.md)

**Assembly:** ScriptHookDotNet (in ScriptHookDotNet.dll)

<a id="gta-world-getallobjects-overloads"></a>

## GetAllObjects Method

Returns all currently existing objects. VERY SLOW! Also includes mission objects! Make sure to check every returned Object with Exists() before using it!

#### Overload List

Returns all currently existing objects. VERY SLOW! Also includes mission objects! Make sure to check every returned Object with Exists() before using it!

> [public static GTA.object[] GetAllObjects();](GTA.World.GetAllObjects_overload_1.md)

Returns all currently existing objects of one model. VERY SLOW! Also includes mission objects! Make sure to check every returned Object with Exists() before using it!

<a id="gta-world-setdoorstate"></a>

## SetDoorState Method

Sets the state of the closest door with the given model.

## Visual Basic

Public Shared Sub SetDoorState( \_
   ByVal *DoorModel* As [GTA.Model](GTA.Model.md), \_
   ByVal *NearbyPosition* As [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md), \_
   ByVal *Locked* As [Boolean](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemBooleanClassTopic.asp), \_
   ByVal *Angle* As [Single](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) \_
)

## C#

public static [void](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemVoidClassTopic.asp) SetDoorState(
   [GTA.Model](GTA.Model.md) *DoorModel*,
   [GTA.Vector3](GTA.Vector3.md) *NearbyPosition*,
   [bool](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemBooleanClassTopic.asp) *Locked*,
   [float](http://msdn.microsoft.com/library/default.asp?url=/library/en-us/cpref/html/frlrfSystemSingleClassTopic.asp) *Angle*
);

#### Parameters

*DoorModel*
:   Model of the nearby door to open.

*NearbyPosition*
:   A position close to the door.

*Locked*
:   The door cannot be moved when locked.

*Angle*
:   The current door angle. 0 is closed, 1 is open, -1 is open to the other direction.

#### See Also

[World Class](GTA.World.md) | [GTA Namespace](GTA.md)

<a id="gta-euphoria-customhelper-start-overloads"></a>

## Start Method

Start the Euphoria animation. It will run up to a maximum of 65 seconds, or until the first previous Euphoria animation ends. Previous Euphoria animations will NOT be disabled.

#### Overload List

Start the Euphoria animation. It will run up to a maximum of 65 seconds, or until the first previous Euphoria animation ends. Previous Euphoria animations will NOT be disabled.

> [public void Start();](GTA.Euphoria.CustomHelper.Start_overload_1.md)

Start the Euphoria animation. Maximum duration is 65.535 milliseconds. Calling this will disable previous Euphoria animations.

<a id="gta-forms-control-keydown"></a>

## KeyDown Event

## Visual Basic

Public Event KeyDown As [GTA.KeyEventHandler](GTA.KeyEventHandler.md)

## C#

public event [GTA.KeyEventHandler](GTA.KeyEventHandler.md) KeyDown;

#### Event Data

The event handler receives an argument of type [KeyEventArgs](GTA.KeyEventArgs.md) containing data related to this event. The following **KeyEventArgs** properties provide information specific to this event.

| Property | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Alt](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Alt.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Alt. |
| [Control](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Control.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Control. |
| [isModifier](GTA.KeyEventArgs.isModifier.md) |  |
| [isMouseButton](GTA.KeyEventArgs.isMouseButton.md) |  |
| [Key](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Key.md) | Returns the key without any modifier information. |
| [KeyWithModifiers](GTA.KeyEventArgs.KeyWithModifiers.md) | Returns the key combined with modifier (Shift, Control, Alt) information. |
| [MouseButton](GTA.KeyEventArgs.MouseButton.md) |  |
| [Shift](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Shift.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Shift. |

#### See Also

[Control Class](GTA.Forms.Control.md) | [GTA.Forms Namespace](GTA.Forms.md)

---

Public Event SelectedKeyChanged As [GTA.KeyEventHandler](GTA.KeyEventHandler.md)

## C#

public event [GTA.KeyEventHandler](GTA.KeyEventHandler.md) SelectedKeyChanged;

#### Event Data

The event handler receives an argument of type [KeyEventArgs](GTA.KeyEventArgs.md) containing data related to this event. The following **KeyEventArgs** properties provide information specific to this event.

| Property | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Alt](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Alt.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Alt. |
| [Control](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Control.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Control. |
| [isModifier](GTA.KeyEventArgs.isModifier.md) |  |
| [isMouseButton](GTA.KeyEventArgs.isMouseButton.md) |  |
| [Key](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Key.md) | Returns the key without any modifier information. |
| [KeyWithModifiers](GTA.KeyEventArgs.KeyWithModifiers.md) | Returns the key combined with modifier (Shift, Control, Alt) information. |
| [MouseButton](GTA.KeyEventArgs.MouseButton.md) |  |
| [Shift](GTA.KeyEventArgs.Shift.md) | Returns if the key was pressed in combination with Shift. |

#### See Also

[Keybox Class](GTA.Forms.Keybox.md) | [GTA.Forms Namespace](GTA.Forms.md)

safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

## Visual Basic

NotInheritable Public Class Template

## C#

public sealed class Template

#### Thread Safety

Public static (**Shared** in Visual Basic) members of this type are
safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.

**Namespace:**
[GTA.Native](GTA.Native.md)

**Assembly:** ScriptHookDotNet (in ScriptHookDotNet.dll)

#### Public Instance Properties

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [AvailableModels](GTA.value.PedComponent.AvailableModels.md) | Returns the number of available models for the component. |
| [AvailableTextures](GTA.value.PedComponent.AvailableTextures.md) | Returns the number of available textures for the currently selected component model. |
| [ModelIndex](GTA.value.PedComponent.ModelIndex.md) | Gets or sets the index of the model for this component. Changing it will reset the TextureIndex to 0! (Value range: 0 to AvailableModels-1) |
| [TextureIndex](GTA.value.PedComponent.TextureIndex.md) | Gets or sets the index of the texture for the currently selected component model. (Value range: 0 to AvailableTextures-1) |

#### Public Instance Methods

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [Change](GTA.value.PedComponent.Change.md) | Changes ModelIndex and TextureIndex at the same time. May throw an ArgumentOutOfRangeException when a given index is invalid. |
| [ChangeIfValid](GTA.value.PedComponent.ChangeIfValid.md) | Changes ModelIndex and TextureIndex at the same time. Will do nothing when a given index is invalid. |
| [isValid](GTA.value.PedComponent.isValid.md) | Returns whether or not the given model and texture index combination is valid. |
| [SetToDefault](GTA.value.PedComponent.SetToDefault.md) |  |

#### See Also

[PedComponent Class](GTA.value.PedComponent.md) | [GTA.value Namespace](GTA.value.md)

Public static (**Shared** in Visual Basic) members of this type are
safe for multithreaded operations. Instance members are **not** guaranteed to be
thread-safe.
